steps.title: Capture the study's finding
steps.content: The study asks whether negative disconfirmation can lead to positive outcomes. Its finding is that many smart-home users used cognitive mechanisms to reduce dissonance and reverse their initial disappointment.

steps.title: Reject mismatched summaries
steps.content: A contradicts the reversal of disappointment. B focuses on poorly understood expectations, which is not the finding. D says little is known about mechanisms, but the study describes mechanisms shaping reactions. The answer is C.
